CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:SqliteDdlGenerator.kt$SqliteDdlGenerator$col.required || col.unique || col.default != null || col.references != null || colName in table.primaryKey

MaxLineLength:SqliteDdlGenerator.kt$SqliteDdlGenerator$"Circular foreign key from '${edge.fromTable}.${edge.fromColumn}' to '${edge.toTable}.${edge.toColumn}' cannot be added in SQLite (no ALTER TABLE ADD CONSTRAINT)"

MaxLineLength:SqliteDdlGenerator.kt$SqliteDdlGenerator$if (cols.any { it in geoColNames }) return blockTableForSpatialMetadata(name, cols.first { it in geoColNames }, "table-level constraint '${constraint.name}'")

MaxLineLength:SqliteDdlGenerator.kt$SqliteDdlGenerator$if (idx.columns.any { it in geoColNames }) return blockTableForSpatialMetadata(name, idx.columns.first { it in geoColNames }, "index on geometry column")
MaxLineLength:SqliteDdlGenerator.kt$SqliteDdlGenerator$message = "${index.type.name} index '${indexName}' on table '$tableName' is not supported in SQLite. Only BTREE is available."
MaxLineLength:SqliteDdlGenerator.kt$SqliteDdlGenerator$message = "Circular foreign key from '${edge.fromTable}.${edge.fromColumn}' to '${edge.toTable}.${edge.toColumn}' cannot be created in SQLite."

MaxLineLength:SqliteRoutineDdlHelper.kt$SqliteRoutineDdlHelper$return DdlStatement("-- TODO: Rewrite trigger ${quoteIdentifier(name)} for SQLite (source dialect: ${trigger.sourceDialect})", listOf(action.toNote()))
